content:
Maybe this should be a separate stream where it is possible to collect all the rustc related stuff but I think the meeting where your proposal will be discussed is this one https://lang-team.rust-lang.org/meetings.html and in the calendar there is the meeting link!

mayeb this in interesting for @y86

Yeah Josh already talked with me. I will talk with nikomatsakis on the pinning stuff as well.

(by the way how do you know that this is going to be in the meeting? I have not found anything about it in the calendar)

All the I-nominated issue goes in the week meeting, I see that Josh has put the label 5 hours a go, so this should be included in the list of the meeting, but not always will be discussed!

I try to read your proposal and I will try to jump also in the lang meeting as well :)
@y86 can you repost the link that I missed it :)

y86 said:

what link are you referring to?

Your pinning proposal
ah you mean the one about initializing pinned structs? That is not quiet done yet :) (although I have a blog post giving an overview)
if you want code, then the library already is done and you can view it here https://github.com/y86-dev/pinned-init
@Vincenzo Palazzo (vincenzopalazzo) was that the link you were searching for?
Mh! It is the proposal that it is nominated by Josh?
Cool thanks! and thanks for the pinned init lib
Blog post https://y86-dev.github.io/blog/safe-pinned-initialization/in-place.html choosed for the deep drive reading meeting in the async working group :)
